single.label: Single
single.children:
{({ closePopover }) => (
    <form>
      <TextInput
          label="Full Name"
          placeholder="Enter name"
      />
      <Select
          blankSelection="Select One..."
          label="Territory"
          name="location"
          options={[
            { value: 'USA' },
            { value: 'Canada' },
            { value: 'Brazil' },
            { value: 'Philippines' },
          ]}
      />
      <Flex spacing="between">
        <Button
            onClick={closePopover}
            text="Apply"
        />
        <Button
            text="Clear"
            variant="secondary"
        />
      </Flex>
    </form>
  )}

double.label: Double
double.children:
{({ closePopover }) => (
    <form>
      <TextInput
          label="Full Name"
          placeholder="Enter name"
      />
      <Select
          blankSelection="Select One..."
          label="Territory"
          name="location"
          options={[
            { value: 'USA' },
            { value: 'Canada' },
            { value: 'Brazil' },
            { value: 'Philippines' },
          ]}
      />
      <Flex spacing="between">
        <Button
            onClick={closePopover}
            text="Apply"
        />
        <Button
            text="Clear"
            variant="secondary"
        />
      </Flex>
    </form>
  )}

sidebar.label: Sidebar
sidebar.template:
<Filter
    isCollapsed={isCollapsed}
    onCollapse={toggleCollapse}{{props}}
>
  <Filter.Section headerText="Full Name">
    <TextInput placeholder="Enter name" />
  </Filter.Section>
  <SectionSeparator />
  <Filter.Section
      collapsed={isCollapsed}
      collapsible
      headerText="Territory"
  >
    <Select
        blankSelection="Select One..."
        name="location"
        options={[
          { value: 'USA' },
          { value: 'Canada' },
          { value: 'Brazil' },
          { value: 'Philippines' },
        ]}
    />
  </Filter.Section>
  <SectionSeparator />
  <Filter.Section
      collapsed={isCollapsed}
      collapsible
      headerText="Products"
  >
    <Checkbox text="Doors" marginBottom="sm" />
    <Checkbox text="Windows" marginBottom="sm" />
    <Checkbox text="Siding" />
  </Filter.Section>
</Filter>

single_filter.message: Single Filter shows the compact layout with the filter trigger, active filters, result count, and sort menu in one row.

double_filter.message: Double Filter splits filter controls from the result count and sort controls, using a lower row for summary and sorting.

no_background.message: No Background renders the same filter controls without the Card wrapper.

filter_only.message: Filter Only keeps the filter trigger and selected filter display while omitting results and sorting props.

sort_only.message: Sort-only mode omits filter children and only renders the sort trigger.

constrained_popover.message: Constrained Popover demonstrates maxHeight and minWidth limits for larger filter forms inside the popover.

sidebar.message: Sidebar mode uses Filter.Section subcomponents and wrapper-managed collapse state so Expand All and Collapse All control every section.
